chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 865 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 13.01.2026 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail and states that order has been passed; according to which, the report was accepted in respect of the FIR no more being available. Accordingly, bail application having become infructuous is disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
